alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing one monocyclic ring system consisting of benzene.
alternative_parents.name: Benzene and substituted derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acetylide group substituted with a metal atom.
alternative_parents.name: Metal acetylides

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a transition metal atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic transition metal salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metalloid atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metalloid salts

alternative_parents.description: Unsaturated monocyclic hydrocarbons having one endocyclic double bond.
alternative_parents.name: Cycloalkenes

alternative_parents.description: Aliphatic Hydrocarbons that contains one or more unsaturated carbon atoms. These compounds contain one or more double or triple bonds.
alternative_parents.name: Unsaturated aliphatic hydrocarbons

alternative_parents.description: Inorganic salts containing a carbon atom combined with one or more elements of similar or lower electronegativity.
alternative_parents.name: Salt-like carbides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds with a positive electric charge.
alternative_parents.name: Organic cations

class.description: Organic compounds containing a metalloid atom.
class.name: Organometalloid compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as alkylarylsilanes. These are organosilicon compounds with the general formula R[Si]R' (R = alkyl, R' = aryl).

direct_parent.description: Organosilicon compounds with the general formula R[Si]R' (R = alkyl, R' = aryl).
direct_parent.name: Alkylarylsilanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a C[Si] bond.
subclass.name: Organosilicon compounds

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and metal atom.
superclass.name: Organometallic compounds
